task_completion.description: Create a new reference item of type 'Bill'

task_completion.description: Enter the correct title for the bill
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the right-hand info pane contains exactly 'John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021'.

task_completion.description: Enter the sponsor's name with the correct role
task_completion.visual_evidence: A creator field is set to the role 'Sponsor' (or equivalent for Bill type) with the last name 'Jackson Lee' and first name 'Sheila'.

task_completion.description: Enter the bill number and legislative body

The 'Session' field contains '117th Congress' and the 'Date' field contains '2021-08-17'.
The 'Abstract' field contains the text starting with 'A bill to amend the Voting Rights Act of 1965 to revise the criteria...' as specified in the task.
